summary:
Among cardiac abnormalities increasing endocarditis risk due to hemodynamic changes, only an atrial septal defect (ASD) differs significantly because its impact primarily relates to associated valvular problems or immunological factors instead of direct alteration akin to other options like VSD, MR, or AR which have clear pathways fostering bacterial colonization. Thus,
\[ \boxed{\text{Option } D (\text{ASD})}. \]
